home.hero_subtitle: Free, instant, and privacy-focused tools for your money and health.

meta.title: SmartCalc - Finance & Health Calculators
meta.desc: Free online financial and health calculators. Mortgage, Loan, BMI, Calorie calculators and more. No login required.

mortgage.name: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.desc: Calculate monthly payments, interest rates, and amortization.

investment.name: Investment Return
investment.desc: Project your investment growth with compound interest.

auto_loan.name: Auto Loan Calculator
auto_loan.desc: Estimate monthly car payments and total loan costs.

retirement.name: Retirement Planner
retirement.desc: Visualize your 401k growth and plan for financial freedom.

debt_payoff.name: Debt Payoff Planner
debt_payoff.desc: Snowball vs Avalanche. Create a structured plan to be debt-free.

bmi.name: BMI Calculator
bmi.desc: Check your Body Mass Index and understand weight health.

calorie.name: Calorie Calculator
calorie.desc: Calculate daily caloric needs (TDEE) for your goals.

millionaire.name: Time to Millionaire
millionaire.desc: See how long it will take to reach your first million.

emergency.name: Emergency Fund
emergency.desc: Calculate how much you need to save for a rainy day.

macro_split.name: Macro Split Calculator
macro_split.desc: Optimize your nutrient intake for muscle gain or fat loss.

rent_vs_buy.name: Rent vs. Buy Analyzer
rent_vs_buy.desc: Compare the total cost of renting vs buying over time.

fire.name: FIRE Calculator
fire.desc: Calculate your Financial Independence, Retire Early date.

orm.name: 1 Rep Max
orm.desc: Estimate your maximum lifting strength and training zones.

pomodoro.name: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.desc: Boost focus with customizable work & break intervals.

salary_hourly.name: Salary ↔ Hourly
salary_hourly.desc: Convert between annual salary and hourly wage instantly.

meeting_cost.name: Meeting Cost
meeting_cost.desc: Track the real-time cost of your meetings.

percentage.name: Percentage Calculator
percentage.desc: Three ways to calculate percentages instantly.

gpa.name: GPA Calculator
gpa.desc: Calculate your cumulative GPA on a 4.0 scale.

typing.name: Typing Speed Test
typing.desc: Measure your typing speed and accuracy in real time.

emergency.status_danger: Dangerous: You have less than 1 month of runway.
emergency.status_warning: Warning: Aim for at least 3-6 months.
emergency.status_good: Good: You have a solid safety net.
emergency.gap_message: You need another ${{amount}} to reach your goal.

orm.reps_hint: How many reps did you perform?

freelance.title: Freelance Rate Calculator
freelance.meta_desc: Calculate your hourly rate based on desired income and expenses.
freelance.subtitle: Calculate the perfect hourly rate to reach your income goals.
freelance.desired_income_help: How much do you want to take home (pre-tax)?
freelance.billable_help: Hours you can actually bill to clients.
freelance.tax_help: Estimated tax percentage to set aside.

heart_rate.title: Target Heart Rate Calculator
heart_rate.meta_desc: Calculate your target heart rate training zones.
heart_rate.subtitle: Optimize your training with personalized heart rate zones.
heart_rate.age_help: Used to estimate Max Heart Rate (220 - Age).
heart_rate.using_simple: Using Standard Formula. Enter Resting HR for better accuracy.
heart_rate.zone1_desc: Improves overall health and helps recovery.
heart_rate.zone2_desc: Improves basic endurance and fat burning.
heart_rate.zone3_desc: Improves aerobic fitness and cardiovascular health.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.meta_desc: Boost productivity with the Pomodoro Technique timer.
pomodoro.focus_msg: Time to focus on your task!
pomodoro.break_msg: Take a short break to recharge.

sleep.title: Sleep Cycle Calculator
sleep.meta_desc: Find the perfect bedtime or wake up time.
sleep.subtitle: Wake up feeling refreshed by syncing with your natural sleep cycles.
sleep.promt: Enter a time to calculate perfect cycles.
sleep.disclaimer: Includes avg. 14 min to fall asleep.

roi.title: ROI / ROAS Calculator
roi.meta_desc: Calculate Return on Investment and Return on Ad Spend.
roi.subtitle: Analyze the profitability of your investments or marketing campaigns.
roi.invested_help: Total cost (e.g. ad spend, stock purchase).
roi.no_profit_chart: Chart displays when there is a profit.

savings.title: Savings Goal Calculator
savings.meta_desc: Plan how much to save monthly to reach your financial goals.
savings.subtitle: Map out your path to a specific financial target.
savings.goal_help: The total amount you want to reach.
savings.years_help: When do you need the money?

financial_hub.meta_title: The Ultimate Guide to Financial Independence - SmartCalc
financial_hub.meta_desc: A complete step-by-step guide to achieving financial freedom using our smart calculators.
financial_hub.hero_subtitle: Financial independence isn't just a dream—it's a mathematical certainty if you follow the right steps. Use our suite of tools to plan your journey.

wellness_hub.meta_desc: Optimize your health with our comprehensive suite of nutrition, fitness, and recovery tools.
wellness_hub.hero_subtitle: Health isn't about guessing. It's about data. Use our precision tools to dial in your nutrition, training, and recovery for peak performance.
